慢热型单元故事修仙文，前后文都很自然，用独自摸索修仙来引导故事，所以就算主角没有什么目标，看的人也不觉得有什么突兀，还有些人前显圣的片段，看来大纲很自然，作者加油，下回再见要么你断更跑路，要么我一次读一千章，年更年看系列，真是一场酣畅淋漓的等待[学会了]","text_exts":[{"e":72,"s":68,"text":"人前显圣","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BA%BA%E5%89%8D%E6%98%BE%E5%9C%A3&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741988099EBAC3DE%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227521390274189230910%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227508464282451840025%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BA%BA%E5%89%8D%E6%98%BE%E5%9C%A3%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1751214659,"group_id":"7508464282451840025","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzZsDRxWVB+jmUS0L9p165eg+OtkAPuQN/2r3BnSu+xu","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bbad3d0bddd04f02a6361c3f11e26342~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791456&x-signature=qIq6YFPD8yrmuhYtlzUYLn6eBVE%3D","user_id":"3971046911775043","user_name":"勿我忘世"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3971046911775043","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7508464282451840025","book_info":{"abstract":"【古典仙侠】【无系统】【烂柯流】
何修缘因一场意外来到一方修仙世界，但此地仙人不显，修仙之人高来高去，缥缈无踪。
何修缘一路追求仙迹，求仙问道，遇到各方妖精鬼魅，只求何修缘点化一二。
时光冉冉，待何修缘蓦然回首间，竟发现自己才是那个仙。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/53407d17d70b3a822b0c145a432a0ef0","author":"林深麋鹿","author_id":"","book_id":"7508464282451840025","book_name":"我于人间成真仙","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#604840","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7508464419567845913","read_count":"65865","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1268148"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"482","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,仙侠,穿越,奇幻仙侠,架空","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/15d4120ed356038b08c0cc7e4cf685a1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779382809&x-signature=Va7yfAt3VdIU96P1fbnXvs1eaNU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"783296458137806","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"73"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032301000987C58EA36E079EBAC3DE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_d
